## [00:00 - 00:39]

Is it recording? Yeah. Okay. Quick thought I wanted to share with you. When it comes to communication skills, don't overthink. A lot of the times when people are thinking about how they're going to improve their communication skills, they think it's about continually consuming more and more and more and more knowledge. If you watch one of my videos, take one of the lessons and immediately apply. Don't overthink it. We live in a generation of overthinking. The more you think, the more you end up thinking. Start taking some of those thoughts or taking some of the lessons and immediately applying. Application and action is what leads to more clarity. Not more thinking. Otherwise, you just continually get confused and never begin the journey.
